---
title: "Q&A"
labels: ["question"]
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        Ask a usage, scope, or release-planning question here. Include enough context for a useful answer.
  - type: textarea
    id: question
    attributes:
      label: Question
      description: What would you like to know?
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: context
    attributes:
      label: Context
      description: Tell us about your workflow, constraints, or why this matters for your work.
---
